description: ciliogenesis and planar polarity effector complex subunit 1 [Source:HGNC Symbol;Acc:HGNC:25801]
ciliary_role: Also known as JBTS17. Most common mutated gene in Joubert syndrome and the related oral-facial-digital syndrome type VI (OFDVI). (29321670). JBTS17 contributes to mitotic progression by interacting with LIS1, its depletion disrupts chromosome alignment and spindle pole orientation, resulting in mitotic delay (31004438). JBTS17 acts upstream of NPHP1 in the assembly of the NPHP1-4-8 complex in the cilia transition zone, it is required for efficient SHH sig ling and for establishing cell polarity (25877302).
